Concise Description: Drive inclusive growth and job creation
Exact Quotes: Firstly, to drive inclusive growth and job creation.
Reasoning: One of the three strategic priorities of the GNU to build a stronger nation.

Concise Description: Reduce poverty and tackle the high cost of living
Exact Quotes: Secondly, to reduce poverty and tackle the high cost of living.
Reasoning: One of the three strategic priorities of the GNU to build a stronger nation.

Concise Description: Build a capable, ethical and developmental state
Exact Quotes: Thirdly, to build a capable, ethical and developmental state.
Reasoning: One of the three strategic priorities of the GNU to build a stronger nation.

Concise Description: Deployment of SANDF to Western Cape and Gauteng for gang violence and illegal mining
Exact Quotes: I am deploying the South African National Defence Force (SANDF) to support the police... I have directed the Minister of Police and the SANDF to develop a tactical plan where our security forces should be deployed within the next few days in the Western Cape and Gauteng to deal with gang violence and illegal mining.
Reasoning: To strengthen the fight against gang violence and illegal mining as part of the focus on organized crime.

Concise Description: Recruitment of additional police officers
Exact Quotes: We are putting more boots on the ground through the recruitment this year of 5 500 additional police officers, adding to the 20 000 new officers we announced in previous SoNAs.
Reasoning: To tackle gun crime and increase enforcement of existing laws.

Concise Description: Establishment of National Illicit Economy Disruption Programme
Exact Quotes: We are establishing a National Illicit Economy Disruption Programme that brings together key state agencies and other stakeholders, including the private sector.
Reasoning: To target high-risk sectors like tobacco, fuel, alcohol and other counterfeit products using data analytics and AI.

Concise Description: Re-vetting and lifestyle audits of SAPS and Metro Police Senior Management
Exact Quotes: The State Security Agency will re-vet the Senior Management of the SAPS and Metro Police departments. The vetting process will include lifestyle audits.
Reasoning: Exposed rampant corruption and abuse of power by the Madlanga Commission of Inquiry.

Concise Description: Introduction of Whistle-Blower Protection Bill
Exact Quotes: The Whistle-Blower Protection Bill will be introduced in Parliament.
Reasoning: To prevent victimisation of those who speak out against corruption and provide support (psychosocial, legal, financial).

Concise Description: Finalisation of new Public Procurement Act regulations
Exact Quotes: Measures will include the use of technology and the finalisation of new Public Procurement Act regulations by mid-2026.
Reasoning: To end corruption in the procurement system where the majority of incidents originate.

Concise Description: Funding for water and sanitation infrastructure
Exact Quotes: We have committed more than R156 billion in public funding for water and sanitation infrastructure over the next three years.
Reasoning: To ensure water security in the long term and address systemic failures and neglect of infrastructure.

Concise Description: Establishment of National Water Crisis Committee
Exact Quotes: we will now elevate our response to the water crisis to a National Water Crisis Committee, which I will chair.
Reasoning: To bring together all existing efforts into a single coordinating body to address water challenges effectively.

Concise Description: Incentive for metros to reform water, sanitation and electricity services
Exact Quotes: we have introduced a new R54 billion incentive for metros to reform their water, sanitation and electricity services.
Reasoning: To ensure revenue from water usage is put straight back into fixing pipes, reservoirs and pumping stations instead of being used for other purposes.

Concise Description: Finalisation of a revised White Paper on Local Government
Exact Quotes: we will, in the coming months finalise a revised White Paper on Local Government.
Reasoning: To provide solutions for the functioning of an effective local government system and address dysfunction.

Concise Description: Public investment in infrastructure
Exact Quotes: Government has committed more than R1 trillion in public investment over three years to build and maintain infrastructure.
Reasoning: To build and maintain infrastructure as an investment in jobs, productivity and growth.

Concise Description: Establishment of specialised courts for commercial matters
Exact Quotes: we will establish specialised courts for commercial matters with dedicated judges and dedicated court rolls to ensure faster outcomes
Reasoning: To prevent undue delays in critical projects arising from tender implementation disputes.

Concise Description: Establishment of a professional State Property Company
Exact Quotes: This year, we will begin work to establish a professional State Property Company
Reasoning: To transform State owned assets into professionally managed engines of growth and development.

Concise Description: Renewable energy supply target
Exact Quotes: By 2030, more than 40% of our energy supply will come from cheap, clean and renewable energy sources.
Reasoning: To transform the energy system for long-term security and drive down the cost of electricity.

Concise Description: Restructuring Eskom and establishing independent transmission entity
Exact Quotes: We are restructuring Eskom and establishing a fully independent state-owned transmission entity... The committee will report to me within three months.
Reasoning: To enable private investment in expanding the national grid and ensure long-term energy security.

Concise Description: Eradication of load reduction
Exact Quotes: We will work in each province to address transformer overloading, illegal connections and equipment failure with the objective of eradicating load reduction by next year.
Reasoning: To modernise the energy system and address local equipment failures.

Concise Description: Public-private partnerships in port terminals and rail corridors
Exact Quotes: Later this year, we will initiate major public-private partnerships in our port terminals and rail corridors through a concession model
Reasoning: To mobilise private investment and expertise while preserving public ownership to improve performance.

Concise Description: Deployment of new Extension Officers to support farmers
Exact Quotes: We will deploy 10 000 new Extension Officers to support farmers and improve agricultural productivity.
Reasoning: To support farmers and improve agricultural productivity, creating opportunities for young people.

Concise Description: Vaccination of national cattle herd for Foot-and-Mouth Disease
Exact Quotes: We have decided to vaccinate the national herd of 14 million cattle. This requires 28 million vaccines over the next 12 months.
Reasoning: To deal with one of the worst outbreaks of foot-and-mouth disease (FMD) which is damaging the economy and resulting in export bans.

Concise Description: Extension of Electronic Travel Authorisation System
Exact Quotes: In the coming year, we will extend the Electronic Travel Authorisation System to all countries that require a visa
Reasoning: To promote tourism by enabling applications to be processed digitally within 24 hours.

Concise Description: Tax deduction for investment in new energy vehicles
Exact Quotes: From March this year, we will introduce a 150% tax deduction for investment in new energy vehicles
Reasoning: To pivot the economy towards green growth and support local production of batteries.

Concise Description: Target for raising new investments
Exact Quotes: We have now set ourselves a target of raising R2 trillion in new investments over the next five years.
Reasoning: To build on the success of the first five Investment Conferences and drive economic growth.

Concise Description: Funding for small and medium enterprises
Amount: R2.5 billion (180,000 SMEs) + R1 billion guarantees
Exact Quotes: This year, we will provide more than R2.5 billion in funding to over 180 000 small and medium enterprises, and extend a further R1 billion in guarantees.
Reasoning: To back those who create opportunity, specifically focusing on women-and youth-led businesses.

Concise Description: Employment equity target for persons with disabilities
Exact Quotes: increase employment equity targets of persons with disabilities in the Public Service to 7% by 2030, and to mandate a 7% preferential procurement target
Reasoning: To ensure no one is left behind and correct injustices of the past.

Concise Description: Compulsory Grade R
Exact Quotes: By making Grade R compulsory, we are getting all children off to a good start.
Reasoning: To establish a firm foundation for learning in the early years of a child's life.

Concise Description: Increase in skills development levy returned to employers
Entity: Department of Higher Education and Training
Exact Quotes: we will increase the proportion of the skills development levy returned to employers, restoring it to its original level of 40%.
Reasoning: To support effective workplace-based learning and align skills development with economic needs.

Concise Description: Mission to end child stunting
Exact Quotes: This year, we will embark on a mission to end child stunting by 2030
Reasoning: More than a quarter of children under five are stunted, affecting their ability to learn and grow.

Concise Description: Redesign of the Social Relief of Distress (SRD) Grant
Exact Quotes: This year, we will redesign the grant to more effectively support livelihoods, skills development, work opportunities and productive activity.
Reasoning: To transform the grant into an instrument that improves lives and supports productive activity.

Concise Description: Phase 4 of construction in District Six
Exact Quotes: With R500 million allocated to this work, we are proceeding with Phase 4 of construction [in District Six].
Reasoning: To redress injustices of the past and fulfill restitution claims for forcibly removed residents.

Concise Description: Rollout of Lenacapavir for HIV prevention
Exact Quotes: we will be undertaking a massive rollout of Lenacapavir, a six-monthly injection that has proven highly effective in preventing HIV transmission.
Reasoning: To prevent and ultimately eliminate HIV/AIDS.

Concise Description: HPV vaccine for young girls
Exact Quotes: ensure that every young girl between the ages of 9 and 15 receives the HPV vaccine.
Reasoning: To end cervical cancer in our country.

Concise Description: Recruitment of additional labour inspectors
Exact Quotes: To tighten enforcement, we will hire an additional 10 000 labour inspectors this year.
Reasoning: To crack down on violations of immigration and labour laws, specifically employers hiring foreign nationals without required visas.

Concise Description: Launch of Digital ID
Exact Quotes: This year, the DHA will launch a Digital ID to enable safe and secure use of digital services for all South Africans.
Reasoning: To enable safe and secure use of digital services and digitise government functions.

Concise Description: National Dialogue and National Convention
Exact Quotes: This year, the National Dialogue process will spread across South Africa... These public dialogues will culminate in a National Convention
Reasoning: To give citizens the opportunity to raise concerns/aspirations and guide the next phase of the National Development Plan.
